topic: US government shutdown meta-prediction - CP analysis
summary: CP for underlying shutdown question is at 30% (Jan 4), below 33.3% threshold. CR expires Jan 30, 2026. Recent downward trend but fundamental driver (approaching CR expiration) should push CP up.
content:
Key findings:
- 2025 shutdown lasted 43 days (Oct 1 - Nov 12, 2025)
- CR signed Nov 13, funds through Jan 30, 2026
- Democrats threatening shutdown over ACA subsidies
- CP currently at 30%, threshold is 33.3%
- CP has been declining from ~38% to 30% over Dec 29 - Jan 4
- CP has crossed the 33.3% threshold 15 times in 70 observations (21.7% crossing rate)
- Historical base: when below threshold, 21.9% chance of crossing back above on next observation
- 70 forecasters on the underlying question
- Check date is Jan 16, just 14 days before CR expiration
